title: 5 Things a Godly Man Is Harder on Himself About Than Anyone Else
caption:
Watch him for five minutes and you'll see it. He'll let a friend's excuse slide, forgive a broken promise before it's even asked, go easy on somebody else's bad day.

Then watch what he does with his own. Same excuses don't survive one more sentence. Same promises get held to a standard nobody else has to hit. Same bad days get graded harder, not easier.

That's not being hard on people. That's a man who's finally aimed the standard at the right target.

"Whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord." — Colossians 3:23

Grace for everyone else. A stricter book for himself. That's the order Christ actually builds into a man.

Save this for the next time you're about to let yourself off easy.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #discipline #humility #scripture #christianity #masculinity #selfcontrol
theme: He holds himself to a stricter standard than he holds anyone else.
